member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.DatabaseInitializer
member.summary: Hosted service responsible for ensuring the application's database schema is applied on startup. Runs EF Core migrations. Failures will stop host startup.
member.param: Logger used to report status and failures.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.DatabaseInitializer.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.IDbContextFactory{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.DatabaseInitializer})
member.summary: Hosted service responsible for ensuring the application's database schema is applied on startup. Runs EF Core migrations. Failures will stop host startup.
member.param: Logger used to report status and failures.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.DatabaseInitializer.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called by the host to start this hosted service. Applies any pending EF Core migrations.
member.param: Cancellation token provided by the host.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.DatabaseInitializer.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called by the host to stop this hosted service. No action required for database initialization.
member.param: Cancellation token provided by the host.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.HostBuilderContextExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to configure and register adventure services into the host's .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.HostBuilderContextExtensions.AddAdventure(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HostBuilderContext,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers adventure services, EF Core context and related configuration sections into the provided .
